purpose: HPE Aruba Networking DevHub landing, SDK, package, sample, and developer guidance pages for RAG discovery.
notes: Do not commit scraped content. Capture only pages allowed by the site terms and preserve source URLs in generated files.

purpose: New Central developer and API how-to pages from the Aruba developer portal.
notes: Refresh with ingestion/scrape.py, scrape_reference.py, and scrape_cnac_spec.py, then rebuild data/docs.lance and data/specs.sqlite.

purpose: General HPE Aruba technical documentation used by docs RAG retrieval.
notes: Keep generated markdown or HTML under the git-ignored source folder with source URL comments.

purpose: Network access control, MAC registration, visitor, MPSK, DPP, and certificate reference material.
notes: Pair prose refreshes with the CNAC OpenAPI extraction when NAC API pages change.

purpose: Validated Solution Guide pages and design guidance used by architecture and workflow RAG answers.
notes: Refresh with ingestion/scrape_vsg.py from a vetted URL list; the site may require Playwright.

purpose: New Central product documentation, feature pages, workflows, and UI terminology.
notes: The site can block plain HTTP clients; use ingestion/scrape_techdocs_pw.py with paced Playwright scraping.

purpose: Switching Feature Navigator wired feature/platform/release availability pages for RAG answers about CX feature support.

purpose: Authoritative OpenAPI specs for exact endpoint, schema, field, and enum lookup.
notes: JSON specs are parsed into docs chunks and data/specs.sqlite; include CNAC via ingestion/scrape_cnac_spec.py.

purpose: AOS 10 techdocs books for Wi-Fi design, location services, private 5G, and AOS operations.
